_meta.purpose: Roster of the mind's subagents. Each subagent's brief is its spec in this directory. every_run fires on every run; debate_panel voices are convened only on a contested call (run cycle step 1e), so on a quiet run none of them fire; on_demand specialists are convened when their invoke_when trigger hits (for example Ideas on a quiet or off-hours run). The mind creates a subagent when a capability is repeatedly needed and retires idle ones. last_used is a hint for spotting idle specialists; the janitor flags ones gone idle too long.

every_run.name: Janitor
every_run.role: memory and agenda housekeeping; flags silent waits, hardcoded personalization in shipped files, and dangling subagents

every_run.name: ConvictionWriter
every_run.role: updates the conviction board from the mind's research brief -- adds/updates entries for conviction-worthy names this run, keeps instrument type and structure freeform, never rebuilds the whole board
every_run.when: each substantive run, after research (steps 2b/3), before ShadowTrader

every_run.name: ShadowTrader
every_run.role: autonomously paper-trades the conviction ideas (open/close SHADOW trades on its own analysis via shadow_trades.py); never touches the real book or guards

debate_panel.name: Strategist
debate_panel.role: argue the primary thesis and the cleanest path to 2R

debate_panel.name: Historian
debate_panel.role: what this name, setup, and regime did before

debate_panel.name: Risk Officer
debate_panel.role: downside, stop, correlation, what kills it

debate_panel.name: Skeptic
debate_panel.role: steelman the bear, name the catch everyone ignores

debate_panel.name: Opportunist
debate_panel.role: biggest honest upside, the case to size up

debate_panel.name: Behaviorist
debate_panel.role: what bias is in me right now

on_demand.name: Editor
on_demand.role: the only writer to tracked/shareable files; implements the mind's edit plan and gates it for share-safety (depersonalize, no secrets, safe to share)
on_demand.invoke_when: ANY edit to a tracked (non-gitignored) file; the mind delegates the edit plan. Gitignored runtime state under state/ is exempt and the mind edits it directly

on_demand.name: Coach
on_demand.role: challenge the owner and the setup
on_demand.invoke_when: off-hours, when there is a real blind spot or setup gap worth one sharp provocation

on_demand.name: Analyst
on_demand.role: deep fundamental and technical read on one name or setup
on_demand.invoke_when: a candidate needs more than the inline deep-dive

on_demand.name: News
on_demand.role: pull and synthesize news and catalysts
on_demand.invoke_when: a name or the tape is moving and I need to know why

on_demand.name: MarketResearch
on_demand.role: sector, regime, flow, and structural research
on_demand.invoke_when: updating the worldview or sizing a macro or regime question

on_demand.name: CaseBuilder
on_demand.role: build the for OR against case, briefed blind, one side
on_demand.invoke_when: a thesis is contested and I want a clean one-sided case to weigh

on_demand.name: DomainExpert
on_demand.role: template to spin up an expert on a specific sector or instrument
on_demand.invoke_when: I need depth on a domain I am thin on (semis, biotech, rates, a specific coin)
